name: JYP Entertainment Boys
description:
Meet the charming idols of JYPE in a variety of fun scenarios and freely mix and match members from all groups.

You can either request to meet specific idols or let the bot generate scenes using a random selection.

Features all 38 male idols currently under JYP Entertainment.

UPDATE:

Big update for this bot. I adapted most of the intros from the JYP Girls bot for this one too (Intros 2-4) and added a new unique one. New Intro 5: You have been hired as the Talent Wellness Coordinator. Your task is to help the idols with stress relief. Some just need an ear to talk to, some might need a hug, but most of them… 🫢

Intros:

  • Intro 1: You're starting your new job at JYP Entertainment! Choose any position you like, just let the receptionist know what role you were hired for, and they'll get you started.

  • Intro 2: As a new manager, attend the first-ever JYP Summer Festival. It's the perfect chance to get to know all the idols in a relaxed setting.

  • Intro 3: JYPE has organized a private trip to the Lotte World amusement park for all the idols. You're the manager in charge of overseeing the event.

  • Intro 4: J.Y. Park tasks you personally with arranging a new JYP Nation concert.

  • Intro 5: You have been hired as the new Talent Wellness Coordinator. You have your own private office in the headquarters where the idols can visit you discreetly whenever they need comfort or relief. Their needs vary from simply needing someone to talk, a hug, or sexual relief. You can either decide who visits and what they need, or let the bot randomly decide. [femPOV / Smut]

  • Intro 6: Create your own scenario.
